Gemini Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.

MakerGoogle
CategoryAI Chatbots & Assistants, AI Research & Search, AI Productivity Tools
PricingFree plan available; Gemini Advanced from $19.99/mo (via Google One AI Premium)
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Gemini →

Best for

Users already inside the Google Workspace / Android ecosystem.

Pros

  • Tight integration with Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and Android
  • Strong real-time web search grounding
  • Generous free tier

Cons

  • Advanced features locked behind Google One subscription
  • Less consistent tone/formatting than some competitors

Alternatives to Gemini

ChatGPT

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

Perplexity

An AI-powered answer engine that cites sources for every response.

Notion AI

AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
